mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT i.id) FROM item_view_log ivl JOIN item i ON ivl.item_id = i.id WHERE ivl.user_id = #{userId}
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT oi.item_id) FROM order_item oi JOIN orders o ON oi.order_id = o.id WHERE o.user_id = #{userId} AND o.status = 'COMPLETED'
SELECT DISTINCT oi.item_id FROM order_item oi JOIN orders o ON oi.order_id = o.id WHERE o.user_id = #{userId} AND o.status = 'COMPLETED' ORDER BY o.create_time DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(o.total_amount), 0) FROM orders o WHERE o.user_id = #{userId} AND o.status = 'COMPLETED'
SELECT DISTINCT o.user_id FROM order_item oi JOIN orders o ON oi.order_id = o.id WHERE oi.item_id = #{itemId} AND o.status = 'COMPLETED'

SELECT user_id FROM ( SELECT ivl.user_id, COUNT(*) as activity_count FROM item_view_log ivl GROUP BY ivl.user_id UNION ALL SELECT o.user_id, COUNT(*) * 5 as activity_count FROM orders o WHERE o.status = 'COMPLETED' GROUP BY o.user_id ) activity GROUP BY user_id ORDER BY SUM(activity_count) DESC LIMIT #{limit}
